name: BLUM HOLDINGS, INC.
summary: PART I References in this document to we, us, our, the Company, or Blm are intended to mean BlumHoldings, Inc., individually, or as the context requires, collectively with its subsidiaries on a consolidated basis. Effective January 12, 2024, Unrivaled Brands, Inc., a Nevada corporation and the Companys predecessor (Unrivaled), completed a reverse stock split of its Common Stock at a 1-for-100 ratio (the Reverse Stock Split ).
